intended_audience: People who cannot reach the official FreeNews Demo entry points

helper.description: Temporary assisted bootstrap helper for blocked users

safety_notes: Use this only while the invite is unexpired.
Never enter wallet seed phrases or private keys.

access_paths.launch_hint: Email the helper with the invite id only

safety_notes: This invite proves the helper route was signed by the organization key.
It does not make the helper a wallet custodian or support agent.
